name: mutation-guard
description: Advisory mutation kill-rate check for one IP's FL-vs-RTL harness.

tasks.detail: List signal-safe, deterministic mutations from LLM-editable RTL only. Read verify/ip_contract.json when present to record required mutation categories, but do not select a static IP profile. Do not mutate FL, SSOT, coverage targets, or source RTL in place.
tasks.criteria: mutation/mutation_report.json records candidates with file, line, rule, before/after fields, and contract_mutation_obligations.

tasks.detail: For each selected mutant, copy the IP to a temporary workspace, rewrite the copied TB manifest to copied RTL, run the existing cocotb test_runner.py, and classify killed/survived/invalid.
tasks.criteria: mutation/mutation_report.json records executed mutants, kill-rate, survived mutants, and invalid mutants.

tasks.content: [MUTATION] Feed survivors back to TB/goal work
tasks.detail: Treat survived mutants as evidence of weak observation or weak stimulus. Add tests or observables; do not edit locked truth just to improve kill-rate.
tasks.criteria: Survivors are converted to concrete TB, coverage, or observable TODOs before production signoff enforcement.
